works.title: AI-Powered Analytics Dashboard
works.description: A comprehensive analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization, built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Features include custom charts, filtering, and export functionality.

works.title: Modern UI Component Library
works.description: A collection of reusable React components with Tailwind CSS, featuring buttons, cards, modals, and forms with comprehensive documentation.

works.title: Microcontroller IoT Project
works.description: An IoT project using Arduino and ESP32 microcontrollers for home automation, featuring temperature monitoring and smart lighting control.

works.title: E-Commerce Platform
works.description: A full-featured e-commerce website with product catalog, shopping cart, payment integration, and admin dashboard.

works.title: Database Design & Optimization
works.description: Technical documentation for database schema design, query optimization, and performance tuning strategies for large-scale applications.

works.title: College Project: Machine Learning Model
works.description: A machine learning model for predicting student performance using Python, scikit-learn, and pandas. Includes data analysis and visualization.

works.title: Real-Time Chat Application
works.description: A real-time chat application using WebSockets, featuring user authentication, message history, and typing indicators.

works.title: Personal Portfolio Website
works.description: This futuristic portfolio website featuring dark mode, neon gradients, glassmorphism design, and responsive layout.

works.title: Mobile App: Task Manager
works.description: A cross-platform task management mobile app built with React Native, featuring task creation, categories, and notifications.

works.title: Circuit Design & Simulation
works.description: Advanced circuit design project with SPICE simulation, including power supply design and signal processing circuits.
